scripts.dev: dotenv -e .env -- concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @qazaq/api" "npm run dev --workspace @qazaq/web"
scripts.build: dotenv -e .env -- npm run build --workspace @qazaq/api && dotenv -e .env -- npm run build --workspace @qazaq/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @qazaq/api && npm run lint --workspace @qazaq/web
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed
